name: Grand Marnier Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch tube pan.
2. Cream butter and 1 cup sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in egg yolks one at a time.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and baking soda; add alternately with sour cream to the egg mixture, mixing well after each addition. Stir in orange rind and chopped nuts.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry; fold into batter gently.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 45-50 minutes.
6. Combine remaining sugar, orange juice, and Grand Marnier. Spoon over the hot cake in the pan; decorate with almonds. Cool before removing from the pan.
